productDisplayName: Puma Men Ferrari Logo Tee II Black Tshirt
description: Composition Black round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, appliqued ferrari logo on the right sleeve, rubber applique on the left chest and two heat tranfers on the back Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations A perfect tee for the races, this black T-shirt from puma is a blend of style and comfort.The rubber applique gives this tee an edgy vibe while the soft cotton fabric gives you exemplary comfort all day long. Pair this with jeans or cargos and sneakers Model statistics Model is a size M of height 6', chest 39" and shoulders 18”
